title: ITW Board of Directors Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: GLENVIEW, Ill., Feb. 10, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Board of Directors of Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) declared a dividend on the company's common stock of $1.31 per share for the first quarter of 2023. The dividend equates to $5.24 per share on a full-year basis. The dividend will be paid on April 13, 2023 to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2023.
